summary: The baby had high levels of combined yellow stuff in their blood and itchy skin from problems within the liver. Red dots appeared when doctors looked at tiny pieces of the liver under special lights, which suggested too much alpha-1 antitrypsin protein building up there. Based on this clue, we think they might have something called Alpha-1 Antitrypsin Deficiency. To be sure though, more tests would need to happen first.
